listings.title: Full PA Setup – Powered Mixer + 15" Speakers – $375 Everything Works
listings.body: Selling my Yamaha EMX660 powered mixer paired with a matching set of Horizon 15” full‑range PA speakers. This is a classic, rugged, gig‑ready system that delivers real volume, clean vocals, and solid low‑end. The mixer and speakers are a proper match — the Yamaha puts out the right power for these cabinets, and the Horizons handle it with ease. Great for: Rehearsals, Church / Community Rooms, Small Events, Backyard Parties, Garage Bands and Gigs. What’s Included: Yamaha EMX660 Powered Mixer - 300W + 300W power output | Built‑in EQ, effects, and limiter | Multiple mic/line inputs |Main + Monitor or Main + Main modes Known for reliability and clean sound Horizon 15” Full‑Range PA Speakers (pair) - Big 15” woofers for strong bass and projection | Full‑range cabinets with horn |Durable,  | Road‑ready build Perfect match for the EMX660’s power
